text:
EXPLANATION: The paper "Learning Latent Dynamics for Planning from Pixels" is a real research paper, but the citation provided omits most of the authors and identifies the wrong conference venue. The actual paper was published in the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2019, with seven authors, not four.

LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/1811.04551
FOUND_TITLE: Learning Latent Dynamics for Planning from Pixels
FOUND_AUTHORS: Danijar Hafner, Timothy Lillicrap, Ian Fischer, Ruben Villegas, David Ha, Honglak Lee, James Davidson
FOUND_YEAR: 2019
VERDICT: LIKELY
